title: Tre's Quality FPS
description:
This Mod was made with only 3 things in mind...
1-How high could your FPS be with the mods on Modrinth
2-Quality of life(No insane changes like different player models| Just lil stuff like built in zoom)
3-Keep the feeling of Vanilla MiceCraft🐁
body:
![Vanilla 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OSuYwpWh/images/78b8681f00721ac7538a2ab5f38b6917327d0622.png)![1.21 Tre's ModPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OSuYwpWh/images/b3b0ec285bf8852da0a12eaccfafe800156e3489.png)The purpose of the ModPack '_-

# This Mod was made with only 3 things in mind...
**1-How high could your FPS be with the mods on Modrinth**

**2-Quality of life(No insane changes like different player models| Just lil stuff like built in zoom)**

**3-Keep the feeling of Vanilla MiceCraft🐁**

**Better FPS** but without the 30+ mods other packs have THAT don't add FPS but that add very noticiable visual effects or animations.

THIS ModPack has around 45 mods.. (23 FPS mods boosting)(20 Quailty of Life)(2 for Shader support)

Give or take per version

Tho I did add some that "change" some mechanics if thats the right word. But I would put them in the quality category. Some are to add extra info (If your into that thing) or make Minecraft feel more immersive(Without a Major change/effecting FPS)


Examples - [Not Enough crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes)(When crashing, you can go back to the title screen and keep playing, without needing to restart.),           [Clist](https://modrinth.com/mod/clist)(Lets u add waypoints),   [modelfix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)(Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models),    [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)(displays each player's ping in the player list),    [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)(more dynamic sounds for every block the player walks on),    [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)(Adds dynamic lights to the game.) ect

Also.. If ur gonna install the mods manually. plz hit the download the pack once(u can delete the file after) or use the lil heart just so the modpack is found by more people)

**Warning - If you're going to install these mods by just clicking the links Modrith provides for each version, MAKE SURE IT'S FOR FABRIC and your correct MC version!! Modrith is funky and might provide the wrong jar versions(May send you to the same version number but for forge**
